description_long: This is an adult woman with a slender build, standing upright with arms slightly extended to the sides. She is wearing a sleeveless, fitted dress with thin straps and a V-shaped neckline, which falls above the knees. Her footwear consists of high-heeled, strappy sandals that accentuate her legs. Her hair is styled in a neat bun at the back of her head, with no visible accessories or headwear. The figure's facial features are neutral, and her posture is relaxed but upright, suggesting she is stationary. No objects are being carried or held, and her attire is suitable for casual or semi-formal urban environments.
description: An adult woman in a sleeveless, above-the-knee dress and high-heeled sandals, standing upright with her hair in a bun. She has a relaxed, neutral posture and is not carrying any objects.
description_view_0: Front view showing the V-neckline, sleeveless dress, and strappy sandals, with arms slightly outstretched.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the dress, the high-heeled sandals, and the bun hairstyle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the dress, the bun hairstyle, and the back straps of the sandals.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the dress profile, high-heeled sandals, and the bun hairstyle from the opposite side.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless fitted dress with thin straps and above-the-knee length
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly extended
attribute_hairstyle: hair styled in a neat bun
